children.heading: Force and effect of contracts and cooperative and other agreements under cooperative forestry programs executed under authority of repealed statutes
children.label: b Force and effect of contracts and cooperative and other agreements under cooperative forestry programs executed under authority of repealed statutes
children.text: Contracts and cooperative and other agreements under cooperative forestry programs executed under authority of the Acts, or portions thereof, repealed under subsection (a) of this section shall remain in effect until revoked or amended by their own terms or under other provisions of law.

children.heading: Availability of funds appropriated under authority of repealed statutes for cooperative forestry assistance programs
children.label: c Availability of funds appropriated under authority of repealed statutes for cooperative forestry assistance programs
children.text: Funds appropriated under the authority of the Acts, or portions thereof, repealed under subsection (a) of this section shall be available for expenditure for the programs authorized under this chapter.
